title: Ubiquiti G6 Pro 360, black, IP camera, outdoor, 12MP
description: Ubiquiti G6 Pro 360 is an outdoor panoramic IP camera from the UniFi Protect series. It is equipped with a 12MP sensor with a resolution of 3504 x 3504 px at 24 fps, a fisheye lens with a 360 ° field of view, and an intelligent IR illuminator with a range of up to 15 m and 4 controllable zones. The camera is fitted with a 10/100 Mbps Ethernet port , which also serves for power supply via PoE+ 802.3at or passive PoE in the range of 37â57V DC. The maximum power consumption of the camera is 7.14… Thanks to AI implementation, the camera supports smart object detection (people, vehicles, animals) Connection 10/100 Mbps RJ45 port Power method 802.3at POE+ Weatherproofing IP66 and Tamper Resistance IK10 Expansion Slot for microSD card Resolution 12MP with 24 FPS 360 ° panorama shot Smart object detection IR Night Vision with 4 x controllable zones Two-way audio Managed via UniFi Protect Device Surface mount Mounting tools and accessories
